subcodes.first_line: O Lord! Aid this servant of Thine to exalt Thy Word and to diffuse Thy signs amongst Thy servants, and expand his breast through the elucidation of Thy proofs [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: رب وفق عبدک هذا علی اعلاء کلمتک و نشر آثارک بین عبادک و اشرح صدره ببیان حججک و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for teaching, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
